name: work-skill
description: Curated Codex skills for naming, multilingual coding style, and Chinese Conventional Commits.

interface.shortDescription: 代码命名、编码规范与中文 Git 提交工作流
interface.longDescription: 提供面向 C、C++、Java、Kotlin、Dart、Go 和 Python 的命名与代码规范，并支持安全的中文 Conventional Commit 工作流。
defaultPrompt: Use $naming-conventions to review these identifiers and suggest clearer names.
Use $language-coding-style to review this code change for style issues.
Use $git-commit-zh to create a Chinese Conventional Commit for this work.
